title: HP ProLiant RAID controller discovery fix (Gen11/iLO6)
name: hp_proliant_fix
description: Drop-in override for the built-in hp_proliant_da_cntlr check, for HPE ProLiant Gen11 / iLO 6. Fixes two issues: (1) the controller table (cpqDaCntlrTable) carries a phantom/placeholder row (typically index 0) with all-zero cells that the built-in check discovers and then reports UNKNOWN ("Controller not found in SNMP data") forever - this override skips such rows already at discovery; (2) Gen11/iLO6 firmware reports cpqDaCntlrBoardCondition = other for healthy controllers, pinning the service to WARN - a new check parameter rule ("HP ProLiant RAID controller") lets the state for the "other" value of Condition / Board-Condition / Board-Status be remapped (default WARN = built-in behaviour). Ships under the same namespace path (cmk/plugins/hp_proliant) so it cleanly shadows the built-in plugin. Remove once fixed upstream.
author: Kuhn & Rueß GmbH
